subcodes.first_line: O thou who art illumined by the rays of the Sun of the most glorious Kingdom! This is among the signs of the favored days, that souls who for a hundred years [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستشرق از انوار شمس ملکوت ابهی این از آثار فضل ایام است که نفوسی که صد سال
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @humility; meekness; lowliness
